title: fougerouxia recta
intro: Fougerouxia recta, also known as African tea plant, is a flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The medicinal properties of Fougerouxia recta are attributed to its high antioxidant content, which has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and lowering blood pressure, due to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. In herbal preparations, Fougerouxia recta is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
